# remnawave_config_profile (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave config profile (Xray configuration template).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Profile name (2-30 chars, letters/numbers/underscores/dashes/spaces).

### Optional

- `config` (String) Xray configuration as JSON string. Opaque to the provider — the panel manages the structure.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) UUID of the config profile.
